metadata.description: UiPath plugin for Claude Code — skills for building RPA (C#, XAML, legacy), agents (coded + low-code), Maestro flows, coded apps, Data Fabric entities, case management, and tests; plus Orchestrator ops, live desktop/browser UI automation, human-in-the-loop, solution design, and diagnostics
